scripts.dev: bun run dev:api & bun run dev:app
scripts.build:webui: bun run --cwd packages/app build && bun run scripts/generate-asset-manifest.ts
scripts.build:cli: bun run build:webui && bun run --cwd packages/cli build:all
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/config typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/schemas typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/app typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/api typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/desktop typecheck
scripts.test: bun run test:schemas && bun run test:app && bun run test:api && bun run test:cli
